name: sidemesh
description: Fleet-first coding-agent session node and Flutter client.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:server && npm run test:mobile:provider-metadata && npm run test:mobile:api-client && npm run test:mobile:capability-ui && npm run mobile:analyze
scripts.mobile:android:dev: cd apps/mobile && flutter run --flavor dev -t lib/main.dart
scripts.mobile:android:prod: cd apps/mobile && flutter run --flavor prod -t lib/main.dart
scripts.mobile:android:build:dev: cd apps/mobile && flutter build apk --flavor dev --debug
scripts.mobile:android:build:prod: cd apps/mobile && flutter build apk --flavor prod --release
scripts.mobile:ios:dev: cd apps/mobile && flutter run --flavor dev -t lib/main.dart
scripts.mobile:ios:prod: cd apps/mobile && flutter run --flavor prod -t lib/main.dart
scripts.mobile:ios:build:dev: cd apps/mobile && flutter build ios --flavor dev --debug
scripts.mobile:ios:build:prod: cd apps/mobile && flutter build ipa --flavor prod --release
scripts.mobile:macos:dev: cd apps/mobile && flutter run -d macos --flavor dev -t lib/main.dart
scripts.mobile:macos:prod: cd apps/mobile && flutter run -d macos --flavor prod -t lib/main.dart
scripts.mobile:macos:build:dev: cd apps/mobile && flutter build macos --flavor dev --debug
scripts.mobile:macos:build:prod: cd apps/mobile && flutter build macos --flavor prod --release
